room.caption: [Vault19] I was happy to hear when some people understood that the battle with The Artist was really a fight between Jeremy and Hex.

instance.creationCode: vaultString=" This will be your fate."
spinSpd=-4 changeDelay=0 moveSpd=0 image_xscale=1.5 image_yscale=1.5 image_angle=90
spinSpd=4 changeDelay=0 moveSpd=0 image_xscale=2 image_yscale=2 image_angle=180
spinSpd=4 changeDelay=0 moveSpd=0 image_xscale=1.3 image_yscale=1.3 image_angle=340
